description: Triggers for extracting transcripts and summarizing YouTube videos

queries.query: Summarize this YouTube video for me: [URL]
Extract the key points from this YouTube talk on machine learning
Create a comprehensive summary of this 2-hour conference recording on YouTube
I don't have time to watch this YouTube video — summarize it with timestamps
Summarize this YouTube tutorial and give me actionable takeaways
Get the transcript from this YouTube video and create a 5-minute read summary
Watch this YouTube interview and extract the most important insights
Create a structured summary of this YouTube documentary for my team
Summarize the YouTube video at this URL with key arguments and evidence
I shared a YouTube link — summarize the content and highlight key moments
Transcribe my voice memo recording
Convert this MP4 video file to text
Summarize this PDF research paper
Transcribe this Zoom recording I downloaded
Create a blog post summary of this article
Write show notes for my podcast episode
Research trends in video content marketing
Help me create a video script for our product demo
What is the best way to learn Python programming?
Convert this MP3 audio file to a structured document
